components.comment: 가입폼 배송국가 선택 (MP08 후속 / D6 — 이커머스 설치 + 해외배송 활성 시에만). 기본값=세션 배송국가(>GeoIP>기본국가). name 바인딩으로 registerForm 에 자동 포함 → /api/auth/register 제출.
components.name: Div

props.className: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-1

props.name: preferred_shipping_country
props.options: {{(_global.modules?.['sirsoft-ecommerce']?.shipping?.available_countries ?? []).filter(c => c.is_active).map(c => ({ value: c.code, label: (c.name?.[_global.locale] ?? c.name?.ko ?? c.code) }))}}
props.className: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500
